zh.lifeSummary: 當Bennet Hodsoll於1596年7月15日出生在英國素可普爾波洛時，她的父親John Hodsoll41歲，母親Faith Bacon32歲。她於1617年6月16日與Edmund Freeman II在英國素可考福爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1630年4月12日在英國素可普爾波洛享年33歲，埋葬在英國素可普爾波洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bennet Hodsoll于1596年7月15日出生在英国素可普爾波洛时，她的父亲John Hodsoll41岁，母亲Faith Bacon32岁。她于1617年6月16日与Edmund Freeman II在英国素可考福爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1630年4月12日在英国素可普爾波洛享年33岁，埋葬在英国素可普爾波洛。

nameMeanings.name: Hodsoll
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Hodsoll (Staffs) or Hodsoll Street in Ash (Kent).

nameMeanings.name: Bennet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The normal medieval vernacular form of   Benedict  , borne by women as well as men in the past. Now sometimes used as an antiquarian revival, but more often a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name.

variants.name: Benett
meanings: The normal medieval vernacular form of   Benedict  , borne by women as well as men in the past. Now sometimes used as an antiquarian revival, but more often a transferred use of the surname derived from the medieval given name.

variants.name: Benet
meanings: From Church Latin benedictus ‘blessed’. This was the name of the saint ( c.480– c.550 ) who composed the Benedictine rule of Christian monastic life that is still followed in essence by all Western orders. He was born near Spoleto in Umbria, central Italy. After studying in Rome, he went to live as a hermit at Subiaco, and later organized groups of followers and imitators into monastic cells. In c.529 he moved to Monte Cassino, where he founded the great monastery that is still the centre of the Benedictine order. His rule is simple, restrained, and practical. See also Bennett .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Bennet Hodsoll was born on 15 July 1596, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, her father, John Hodsoll, was 41 and her mother, Faith Bacon, was 32. She married Edmund Freeman II on 16 June 1617, in Cowfold, Sussex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 12 April 1630, in Pulborough, Sussex, England, at the age of 33, and was buried in Pulborough, Sussex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bennet Hodsoll est née le 15 juillet 1596, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, John Hodsoll, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Faith Bacon, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Freeman II le 16 juin 1617, à Cowfold, Sussex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 12 avril 1630, à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans, et a été enterrée à Pulborough, Sussex, Angleterre.

Juni 1617 in Cowfold, Sussex, England Edmund Freeman II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 12. Lei sposato Edmund Freeman II il 16 giugno 1617, nel Cowfold, Sussex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Bennet Hodsollが1596年7月15日にイギリススセックスプウルボロウで生まれた時，父John Hodsollは41歳，母Faith Baconは32歳であった。1617年6月16日にイギリススセックスコウフォルドでEdmund Freeman IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1630年4月12日にイギリススセックスプウルボロウで33歳で死去し，イギリススセックスプウルボロウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bennet Hodsoll(이)가 1596년 7월 15일 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Hodsoll(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Faith Bacon(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1617년 6월 16일 영국 수세스 코우폴드에서 Edmund Freeman II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1630년 4월 12일 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에서 33세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수세스 풀버루그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bennet Hodsoll nasceu em 15 de julho de 1596, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Hodsoll, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Faith Bacon, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Freeman II em 16 de junho de 1617, em Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 12 de abril de 1630, em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 33 anos, e foi sepultada em Pulborough, Sussex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bennet Hodsoll родилась 15 июля 1596 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Hodsoll было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Faith Bacon, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Freeman II 16 июня 1617 г. в местности коуфолд, суссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 12 апреля 1630 г. в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 33 лет и была похоронена в местности пулбороую, суссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Edmund Freeman II el 16 de junio de 1617, en Cowfold, Sussex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas.
